phase_commitments.commitment: Remove archive, legacy migration, generated artifact, reference-report, pytest cache, and __pycache__ surfaces from the active repository tree.
phase_commitments.acceptance_check: No main-tree paths remain under docs/archive, docs/superpowers, backend/database/migrations/_legacy, artifacts, .pytest_cache, .deepeval, data/reference_reports, or __pycache__.

phase_commitments.commitment: Provide durable machine-readable state, export policy, known-failure tracking, and gate issue contracts.
phase_commitments.acceptance_check: Unit tests validate the harness policy files and gate output contract.

phase_commitments.commitment: Preserve one canonical research entrypoint and mark render-only or legacy scripts as non-production paths.
phase_commitments.acceptance_check: Entrypoint tests prove the canonical harness path is discoverable and legacy/demo paths cannot masquerade as production.

phase_commitments.commitment: Require run_id and manifest-based artifact resolution for production report loading; allow latest-artifact glob only as an explicit debug fallback.
phase_commitments.acceptance_check: Report loader and client report contract tests pass without relying on workspace artifacts.

phase_commitments.commitment: Write a machine-readable evidence packet from ResearchGraphState and include it in the per-run artifact manifest.
phase_commitments.acceptance_check: Evidence packet and harness manifest tests validate packet hash, refs, limitations, and manifest integration.

phase_commitments.commitment: Extract low-risk citation artifact I/O from scripts/generate_report.py without changing the returned citation artifact contract.
phase_commitments.acceptance_check: Citation artifact writer tests and report/harness targeted tests pass.
